name: WP-secapi-quota-billing
description: Fix three metering/quota correctness gaps: route the homework-summary LLM call through the metered wrapper (F-128); guard the /assessments/:id/answer early-return so it does not deduct quota without an LLM call (F-146); fix the outbox-spillover rate-limit rows silently consuming the daily push-notification cap (F-148). NOTE (slice scan): touches the quota metering path, NOT the Stripe/RevenueCat webhook handlers the IF CUT-B3 cutover rewrites - verified disjoint, parallel-safe.
acceptanceCriteria: F-128/146/148 each remediated; billing/quota fixes emit a structured metric or Inngest event per the silent-recovery ban (console.warn alone insufficient); quota-charge correctness tested.
bodyText:
Bundle brief — quota / billing correctness
Rationale: three metering gaps let usage be charged without service (or service without charge) and let internal rows consume user quota. Strategy: route all billable LLM calls through the metered wrapper, gate quota deduction on actual LLM use, and stop spillover rows from drawing the daily push cap; per the silent-recovery ban each correction emits a structured metric/Inngest event. Scope: quota metering path only — NOT the Stripe/RevenueCat webhook handlers (verified disjoint from the IF CUT-B3 cutover, parallel-safe). One PR.
F-128 — homework-summary LLM call routed through the metered wrapper
F-146 — assessments answer early-return no longer deducts quota without an LLM call
F-148 — outbox-spillover rate-limit rows no longer consume the daily push cap
Acceptance Criteria: F-128/146/148 each remediated; billing/quota fixes emit a structured metric or Inngest event per the silent-recovery ban (console.warn alone insufficient); quota-charge correctness tested. Children 711/712 are absorbed provenance; lands as one PR.
